title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.600 - Certified copy, evidence when
text:
490.600.  Certified copy, evidence when. — When it shall appear to the court that such marriage contract, duly acknowledged or proved and recorded, is lost or is not in the power of the party wishing to use it, a copy thereof, duly certified under the hand and seal of the recorder, may be received in evidence.
(RSMo 1939 § 1871) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1707; 1919 § 5394; 1909 § 6338 
Marriage records destroyed, 451.170, 451.180, 451.190
